title: Language Change - "Later" button
scenario: Changing device language and tapping "Later" on the update prompt incorrectly changes the language instead of keeping the current language displayed.
steps: 3. Change the device language to a different language.
4. When the update prompt appears, tap the "Later" button.
5. Observe the displayed language on the device.
expected: The language should not be changed and the current language should remain displayed.
